channel.title: Researches on Anirudh Vemula
channel.description: Recent content in Researches on Anirudh Vemula

item.title: Research
item.description: Check out news page for latest updates. Publications Conference Publications Provably Efficient Imitation Learning from Observation Alone Wen Sun, Anirudh Vemula, Byron Boots, J. Andrew Bagnell ICML 2019 Acceptance rate: 22% Contrasting Exploration in Parameter and Action Space: A Zeroth Order Optimization Perspective Anirudh Vemula, Wen Sun, J. Andrew Bagnell AISTATS 2019 (arxiv, code) Acceptance rate: 32% Social Attention: Modeling Attention in Human Crowds Anirudh Vemula, Katharina Muelling, Jean Oh ICRA 2018 (arxiv)
